textByHash.070bfa79d0d6ad97494190f93ae590039a61ab01: Don't hurt me, don't hurt me!
textByHash.ca6ef1973e05865710d8c8f378343bb81b5b740f: I don't have anything; please believe me!
textByHash.d4caf15759db8dbdd6b124d8b9984272eb179ebf: I'm begging your kindness; I don't have it!
textByHash.0eb33d08e53829c88430d4c0063d53038055c2f4: I'll tells you where that things you wants is. The mad skavids have it in their cave in the city.
textByHash.2a2a3913c36646594262ab31a300ac64b6de6f38: You will have to learn skavid, otherwise they will not talks to you. Here, I'll tell you what you need to know...
textByHash.3306c2f8456d6868f0074818ece010bce47cbc92: I cannot help you, but the others can. Let me tells you the most common skavid words: Ar, nod, gor, ig and cur. Those will gets you started.
textByHash.77aec539c20943ada71231819148fe41b16e0bd3: Master, how are you doing learning our language?
textByHash.d2be322d160d611953b4e8c68a76f5fb18e7fedc: Master, my kinsmen tell me you have learned skavid. You should speak to the mad ones in their cave.
